'''wobawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yogalike|yogalike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yogalike|yogalike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wobawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wobawithi|wobawithi]] || [[word:wobawiji|wobawiji]] || [[word:wobawishi|wobawishi]] || [[word:wobawiki|wobawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wobawuthuthu|wobawuthuthu]] || [[word:wobawujuju|wobawujuju]] || [[word:wobawushushu|wobawushushu]] || [[word:wobawukuku|wobawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wobawuthu|wobawuthu]] || [[word:wobawuju|wobawuju]] || [[word:wobawushu|wobawushu]] || [[word:wobawuku|wobawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wobawufthuf|wobawufthuf]] || [[word:wobawufjuf|wobawufjuf]] || [[word:wobawufshuf|wobawufshuf]] || [[word:wobawufkuf|wobawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wobawethe|wobawethe]] || [[word:wobaweje|wobaweje]] || [[word:wobaweshe|wobaweshe]] || [[word:wobaweke|wobaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wobawothotho|wobawothotho]] || [[word:wobawojojo|wobawojojo]] || [[word:wobawoshosho|wobawoshosho]] || [[word:wobawokoko|wobawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wobawotho|wobawotho]] || [[word:wobawojo|wobawojo]] || [[word:wobawosho|wobawosho]] || [[word:wobawoko|wobawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wobawofthof|wobawofthof]] || [[word:wobawofjof|wobawofjof]] || [[word:wobawofshof|wobawofshof]] || [[word:wobawofkof|wobawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfthÃŸf|wobawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfjÃŸf|wobawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfshÃŸf|wobawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfkÃŸf|wobawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wobawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wobawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wobawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wobawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfthÃŸf|wobawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfjÃŸf|wobawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfshÃŸf|wobawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfkÃŸf|wobawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfthÃŸf|wobawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfjÃŸf|wobawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfshÃŸf|wobawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wobawÃŸfkÃŸf|wobawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wobawÃḊthÃḊ|wobawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wobawÃḊjÃḊ|wobawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wobawÃḊshÃḊ|wobawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wobawÃḊkÃḊ|wobawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wobawathatha|wobawathatha]] || [[word:wobawajaja|wobawajaja]] || [[word:wobawashasha|wobawashasha]] || [[word:wobawakaka|wobawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wobawatha|wobawatha]] || [[word:wobawaja|wobawaja]] || [[word:wobawasha|wobawasha]] || [[word:wobawaka|wobawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wobawafthaf|wobawafthaf]] || [[word:wobawafjaf|wobawafjaf]] || [[word:wobawafshaf|wobawafshaf]] || [[word:wobawafkaf|wobawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wobawasha|wobawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wobawshÃḋsha|wobawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wobawrosha|wobawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wobawmusha|wobawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wobawyasha|wobawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowobawnkshÃḋsha|gowobawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowobawnkrosha|gowobawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowobawnkmusha|gowobawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowobawnkyasha|gowobawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wobabawasha|wobabawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wobabawshÃḋsha|wobabawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wobabawrosha|wobabawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wobabawmusha|wobabawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wobabawyasha|wobabawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowobabawnkshÃḋsha|gowobabawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowobabawnkrosha|gowobabawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowobabawnkmusha|gowobabawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowobabawnkyasha|gowobabawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:webÃḊwasha|webÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:webÃḊwshÃḋsha|webÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:webÃḊwrosha|webÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:webÃḊwmusha|webÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:webÃḊwyasha|webÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowebÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|gowebÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowebÃḊwnkrosha|gowebÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowebÃḊwnkmusha|gowebÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowebÃḊwnkyasha|gowebÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wobfawasha|wobfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wobfawshÃḋsha|wobfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wobfawrosha|wobfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wobfawmusha|wobfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wobfawyasha|wobfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowobfawnkshÃḋsha|gowobfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowobfawnkrosha|gowobfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowobfawnkmusha|gowobfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowobfawnkyasha|gowobfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
